name: Create live tracker runtime folder and server
description: Initialize the directory structure and main HTTP server module for the project tracker.
done_definition: Directory exists and server.js file contains basic HTTP server logic.
critical_path_reason: First foundational step of the Live Tracker runtime setup.
next_action: Proceed to dark themed UI dashboard design

name: Create dark UI dashboard shell
description: Develop the HTML and CSS styling for the high-tech dark theme dashboard.
done_definition: index.html exists and renders a dark theme stylesheet with standard panels.
critical_path_reason: Enables visual layout rendering for the dashboard checklist.

name: Add auth and protected live endpoints
description: Secure all /api routes and index page with Local Basic Authentication.
done_definition: Unauthenticated curls to /api routes return 401 Unauthorized status.
critical_path_reason: Secures internal project checklists and telemetry from exposure.

name: Add truth-linked project checklist
description: Load the one-year milestone plan into tasks.json and dynamically bind it to UI rows.
done_definition: Tasks checklist table is successfully populated dynamically from data/tasks.json.
critical_path_reason: Core tracking checklist must render for subsequent integration milestones.

name: Map all HAS agents to tracker status feed
description: Synchronize statuses of the 12 agents in the main swarm with data/status.json.
done_definition: All 12 agents have real-time statuses and runtime metrics updated in status.json.
critical_path_reason: Blocks swarm synchronization and local worker health validations.
next_action: Expose endpoint and hook to agent runner process

name: Map all HASF builds to tracker build feed
description: Synchronize statuses of the 9 DevSecOps builds with data/status.json.
done_definition: All 9 builds have exit codes, artifact targets, and logs mapped in status.json.
critical_path_reason: Blocks software factory build reporting and deployment metrics.

name: Ingest hochster71 GitHub project inventory
description: Clones all repositories from hochster71's GitHub account and generates metadata indexes.
done_definition: Consolidated list of GitHub repositories, hashes, and domains is logged.
critical_path_reason: Essential dependency to deduplicate codebase versions.
next_action: Configure GitHub PAT credentials and run fetch script

name: Ingest local hard drive project inventory
description: Traverses local storage directories to index code snippets, workspace configurations, and offline logs.
done_definition: Uncommitted local folders are scanned and indexed with path details.
critical_path_reason: Ensures no active local scripts are missed during consolidation.

name: Ingest Google Drive and iCloud Drive inventory
description: Gathers personal documents, budgeting files, checklists, and diet files from cloud storage mountpoints.
done_definition: All cloud files are resolved to absolute host paths and index metadata.
critical_path_reason: Critical for personal and business domain mapping.
next_action: Check directory mounts and list contents

name: Deduplicate and classify applications, snippets, docs, assets
description: Computes SHA256 hashes of all ingested files to eliminate duplicates and group them by domain (personal, business, hobby).
done_definition: De-duplicated master dataset is saved as a structured project database.
critical_path_reason: Blocks building the global registry.
next_action: Run de-duplication script and output statistics

name: Build global HAS/HASF project registry
description: Builds a unified index metadata dashboard exposing all projects, modifications, and active scopes.
done_definition: Global index registry file exists and contains metadata for all consolidated folders.
critical_path_reason: Enables gap analyses and schedule allocations.
next_action: Write JSON database with index structures

name: Run gap analysis across applications and prompt library
description: Compares prompt templates and tools with specifications to find functional or architectural gaps.
done_definition: Gap analysis report is compiled and saved under docs/evidence/.
critical_path_reason: Enables schedule prioritization and Northstar plan alignment.
next_action: Run prompt parser checks and file inspections

name: Run DevSecOps gap analysis: SAST, DAST, SCA, secrets, containers
description: Audits current codebase container limits, security scanners integration, and hardcoded secrets.
done_definition: Vulnerability findings and scanning holes are categorized by severity.
critical_path_reason: Direct dependency for setting up software factory security gates.
next_action: Execute test security scans and log holes

name: Run personal/home-life automation gap analysis
description: Examines existing workflows for calendar synchronization, pet scheduling, and family budgets.
done_definition: Home automation gaps list exists and has clear remediation actions.
critical_path_reason: Identifies necessary API wrappers for calendars/checklists.

name: Run business/finance/legal/HR automation gap analysis
description: Identifies manual workflow constraints in personal tax calculations, accounting inputs, and legal records.
done_definition: Business gap list compiles, outlining HR template and document tool omissions.
critical_path_reason: Forms the backlog for finance automation.

name: Run hobbies/pets/investing/research automation gap analysis
description: Audits current investment tracking tools, aquarium/pet telemetry logs, and research aggregators.
done_definition: Hobby metrics gap report is generated.
critical_path_reason: Identifies research scraping and ingestion needs.

name: Create 12-month PERT schedule with critical path
description: Constructs the master PERT scheduling network graph based on optimistic, realistic, and pessimistic estimates.
done_definition: PERT charts and critical path calculations are committed to the docs directory.
critical_path_reason: Provides the overall dependency timeline.
next_action: Synthesize all gap reports and calculate optimistic/pessimistic ranges

name: Create Northstar plan to halve production time
description: Drafts the strategic acceleration plan focusing on thin vertical slices and automated DevSecOps loops.
done_definition: Northstar plan details exit conditions, testing automation steps, and targets.
critical_path_reason: Defines the core priority weightings for all subsequent features.

name: Build always-running research agent loop
description: Implements the daemon loop scraping industry RSS feeds, pre-filtering topics, and appending backlog items.
done_definition: Scraping daemon triggers automatically and populates tracker status files.
critical_path_reason: Key task to ensure the research agent feed functions.
next_action: Write python loop with feedparser integration

name: Build HAS personal-life autonomy workflows
description: Constructs the diet planner, family calendar reconciler, and pet activity tracker modules.
done_definition: Diet plans, calendar syncs, and pet checklists show active integration.
critical_path_reason: Core milestone for personal life lane automation.
next_action: Draft diet schema and recipe database integration

name: Build HAS business autonomy workflows
description: Constructs automated ledger parsing, compliance reporting, and document drafting templates.
done_definition: Tax forecasts and HR contracts generate automatically based on variables.
critical_path_reason: Core milestone for business/financial operations.

name: Build HASF spec-to-deploy software factory lane
description: Establishes the autonomous software factory loop (Code-Gen -> Unit Tests -> SAST/DAST Scan -> CD Release).
done_definition: Pipeline accepts specs, passes unit tests/security scans, and triggers local deployment.
critical_path_reason: Blocks autonomous integration capabilities.
next_action: Integrate Docker deployment loops and Playwright gates

name: Integrate QA verdict gates: GO, CONDITIONAL GO, NO-GO
description: Wires formal QA gates checking evidence availability, vulnerability counts, and unit tests before approval.
done_definition: Releases are blocked unless the QA Auditor produces a formal GO verdict.
critical_path_reason: Essential for deployment safety checks.
next_action: Write validation functions for Docker image status

name: Integrate Stripe or brokered monetization workflow with human approval gate
description: Wires payment service gateway subscriptions, pricing tables, and invoice checks under human-approved flows.
done_definition: Transactional endpoints run successfully and require explicitly logged user approval.
critical_path_reason: Ensures absolute containment and security of financial records.
next_action: Setup Stripe API sandbox and routing paths

name: Create product backlog for monetizable applications
description: Documents a curated set of monetizable applications derived from application scanning and news analysis.
done_definition: Pricing plans, features list, and release paths exist for 5 candidate systems.
critical_path_reason: Directs future software factory coding tasks.

name: Connect tracker to real HAS/HASF event stream
description: Upgrades the tracker endpoints to parse the live Python backend main ledger database directly.
done_definition: Tracker queries SQLite swarm_ledger.db runtime_truth state for projections.
critical_path_reason: Removes simulated data reliance.
next_action: Configure database file polling and write node-sqlite3 queries

name: Add production logging, audit evidence, and replayable event history
description: Appends and streams detailed event block chains for auditing and replay capabilities.
done_definition: A complete, append-only history is queryable via /api/events.
critical_path_reason: Verifies historical system changes securely.
next_action: Setup append-only write locks on data/events.ndjson

name: Add launchd service to keep tracker running on Mac
description: Deploys a custom plist agent under LaunchAgents to ensure automatic daemon boot.
done_definition: launchctl list displays the tracker agent running.
critical_path_reason: Secures always-on tracking compliance.

name: Run final QA on tracker truth linkage and projections
description: Validates variance formulas, critical path traversals, and projection data bounds.
done_definition: Automation scripts verify correct dashboard rendering under load.
critical_path_reason: Ensures data precision before promotion.

name: Promote tracker as always-on HAS/HASF project command center
description: Pins the Live Tracker on the operator console as the primary truth command center.
done_definition: Dashboard is accessible and all checks show green/production state.
critical_path_reason: Completes the Live Project Tracker roadmap.

name: Bind HAS/HASF Live Tracker to live API / SQLite ledger truth
description: Binds the tracker to live API and SQLite database truth dynamically with fallback failover.
done_definition: E2E truth source integration test suite passes successfully.
critical_path_reason: Binds data to database truth.

name: Add landscape command center view
description: Create a high-tech wide landscape view mapping all domains, agents, builds, and DORA telemetry.
done_definition: Landscape tab renders domains, agent grid, critical path, and build strips.
critical_path_reason: Foundational view of the advanced landscape command center.

name: Add gap analysis view
description: Build the gap list, capability matrix, risk register, and missing data reports.
done_definition: Gap Analysis tab renders capability coverage matrix and risk tables.
critical_path_reason: Verifies gaps in the project codebase and automation.

name: Add production speed / DORA metrics panel
description: Calculate and render lead time, deployment frequency, change fail rate, and rework hours.
done_definition: DORA metrics section displays throughput, stability, and lead time stats.
critical_path_reason: Measures system development velocity objectively.

name: Add PERT / critical path landscape rail
description: Implement optimistic, likely, and pessimistic PERT task models to project path drag.
done_definition: PERT expected hours and critical path flags are displayed on the path rail.
critical_path_reason: Provides statistical backing for swarm projections.
next_action: Write E2E test specs for landscape

name: Add landscape and gap analysis E2E tests
description: Write Playwright spec files to verify render states, tooltip focus, and detail drawers.
done_definition: Playwright runs and reports 100% success on new specs.
critical_path_reason: Guarantees zero regressions in Landscape and Gap views.

name: Add disk-pressure guard and snapshot retention policy
description: Expose /api/disk and enforce safe snapshot bounds ensuring absolute and preferred limits.
done_definition: API blocks snapshot execution when free disk space falls under 25GB.
critical_path_reason: Safeguards Mac filesystem from saturation.

name: Add launchd persistence plan
description: Design a plist daemon config to persist the node service on boot and sleep wakeup.
done_definition: Plists are mapped and detailed in docs, ready for user-approved activation.
critical_path_reason: Prepares server for always-on background tracking.
next_action: Verify E2E tests and obtain launchd installation approval

name: Restore live HAS API feed on port 8000
description: Restore live HAS API feed on port 8000 by checking Docker daemon health and launching compose services.
done_definition: Live HTTP API on port 8000 is accessible and registers healthy response.
critical_path_reason: Enables live Swarm orchestration truth linkage.
next_action: Check docker daemon status and start compose service
